en: What are you guys up to this weekend? I am taking my fiancee apple picking.
Really excited. Ah, the old ball and chain. Lovely.
ko: 진짜 기대돼. 아, 족쇄 차인 몸이구나. 좋겠다.

en: Meanwhile, I'm over here going on a date with my Netflix account. Oh, my God.
ko: 그 사이 나는 Netflix 계정이랑 데이트야.

en: You Ben Marshall take Ozark season four as your lawfully wedded wife?
ko: Ben Marshall, 오자크 시즌 4를 합법적인 아내로 맞이하시겠습니까?

en: I do, I do. It's just a joke. Yeah, it's a joke.
All kidding aside, you'll find someone. You're a great guy. Thank you.
ko: 농담은 그만하고, 넌 누군가를 만날 거야.

en: Here's to hoping.
Three normal goth guys, not a single weird thing about them, they're living their lives
ko: 세 명의 평범한 고스 남자, 이상한 점은 하나도 없어.

en: from day to day in a totally regular way.
Three normal goths. Pizza time.
Oh, yeah. Okay. Pizza and nachos. Am I adulting right?
Treat yourself. Hey, guys, I want abs.
I really do, but I want pizza more.
ko: 진짜로, 근데 피자가 더 먹고 싶어.

en: Three normal guys with conventional taste. Three normal goths.
You know who's just like hilarious? Peter Griffin. Yep.
They use the normal people bathroom and they try to stay in very good shape.
ko: 일반인 화장실을 쓰고, 몸매 관리를 열심히 하려고 해.

en: FML, the Beatles aren't on Spotify?
Those rat bastards, they'll pay for what they did.
Sometimes the jokes don't land. Knock, knock. Hey.
What? I'm just saying hi to my three favorite co-workers. Oh, God. You stop that.
ko: 뭐? 내가 제일 좋아하는 동료 세 명이랑 있어.

en: Anyway, I'll leave you to it. Have a good one. See ya. Bye.
Can we talk about that hat? Oh, my God. I was going to say.
Who are you calling? I don't even want to say. Who are you calling? Fashion police. Oh, no.
Oh, my God. You're bad. They're surprisingly judgy when it comes to other people's fashion choices.
Hey, John. Mm-hmm. Did you...
What? Did you change something? Oh, yeah.
I tattooed my eyeballs. Oh. Yeah. I'm just spicing it up for the summertime.
He made his eyes black for the summertime.
Remember Cancun? Yep. It was loco.
Honestly, the whole time I was kind of like, I miss my doggo.
ko: 솔직히 내내 내 강아지가 보고 싶었어.

en: Oh, buster. They've got homo, got dogs, and got kids, too.
ko: 집도 있고, 강아지도 있고, 아이들도 있어.

en: They also happen to be Disney adults.
Three normal guys.
All right.
